expectations.evidence: No sub-skill file is loaded or referenced.

expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs get-page 98765 to fetch the spec
expectations.evidence: Does not use confluence.mjs. Describes using MCP tool 'getConfluencePage' with page ID 98765 but not the skill's script.

expectations.text: Uses jira.mjs issue-types MOBILE to check available types
expectations.evidence: Does not use jira.mjs. Describes using MCP tool 'getJiraProjectIssueTypesMetadata' for MOBILE project.

expectations.text: Creates Epic FIRST before any child tickets
expectations.evidence: Step 3 is 'Create the Epic' and Step 4/5 are 'Create Child Stories' and 'Create Child Tasks', confirming Epic-first order.

expectations.text: Child tickets use --parent with the Epic key
expectations.evidence: Describes setting 'parent or Epic Link set to the Epic key from Step 3' but not using --parent flag in jira.mjs.

expectations.text: Presents breakdown plan to user before creating
expectations.evidence: No explicit confirmation or review step before creating. The approach describes sequential creation without user approval.
No reference to any of these files in the approach.
